title: APPGECET Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: APPGECET Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Andhra Pradesh PGECET Result 2026 Out for M.Tech/M.Pharmacy Admissions on the official website - apsche.ap.gov.in on May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the APPGECET result.

content.text: Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) has officially released the APPGECET 2026 Results for candidates who appeared in the Andhra Pradesh Post Graduate Engineering Common Entrance Test (AP PGECET). The results are now available online for admission into PG courses such as M.Tech, M.Pharmacy, and Pharm.D (PB) for the academic session 2026.

APPGECET Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - apsche.ap.gov.in. Candidates can check and download their rank card by entering their registration number, hall ticket number, and date of birth on the result portal. Students are advised to verify all details mentioned on the result and contact the authorities in case of any discrepancies.

APSCHE has declared the APPGECET 2026 results for PG engineering and pharmacy courses on its official website. Candidates can now access their rank card online and download it for counselling and admission purposes.

rows: Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE)

content.text: APSCHE has activated the direct link to check APPGECET 2026 results online. Candidates can access their PGECET rank card and score instantly through the official portal using their login credentials. Use the link below to view and download your result.
Follow these simple steps to check and download your APPGECET 2026 rank card online:

items: Click on the APPGECET 2026 result link available on the homepage
Enter your Registration Number, Hall Ticket Number, and Date of Birth
Your APPGECET Rank Card 2026 will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout for future reference
